content.thinking: We have the file: project-context.ts. Let's read its contents to see the issue. Possibly it's not exporting a valid factory function. We'll read the file.

arguments.edits: [{"oldText": "import * as fs from 'fs'; import * as path from 'path'; export default { name: \"project-context\", description: \"Injects Autonomedia operational markdown files into the system prompt with strict memory truncation.\", // This hook fires immediately before the agent begins its session before_agent_start: async (context: any) => { const MAX_CHARS_PER_FILE = 3000; const cwd = process.cwd(); // Define the specific operational files to inject. // Note: Pi natively loads AGENTS.md, so we do not duplicate it here. const filesToLoad = [ 'task_plan.md', 'progress.md' ]; let injectedContext = \"\\n\\n### AUTONOMEDIA OPERATIONAL CONTEXT ###\\n\"; for (const file of filesToLoad) { const filePath = path.join(cwd, file); if (fs.existsSync(filePath)) { const content = fs.readFileSync(filePath, 'utf8'); // Aggressive truncation to protect your M1 Mac's context window limit if (content.length > MAX_CHARS_PER_FILE) { injectedContext += `\\n--- ${file} (TRUNCATED) ---\\n`; injectedContext += content.substring(0, MAX_CHARS_PER_FILE); injectedContext += \"\\n...[CONTENT TRUNCATED TO PROTECT TOKEN LIMITS]...\\n\"; } else { injectedContext += `\\n--- ${file} ---\\n`; injectedContext += content + \"\\n\"; } } } // Ensure the agent knows about the skeleton file we created in Step 1 injectedContext += \"\\n> REMINDER: A compressed codebase map is available at ./CONTEXT/skeletons/autonomedia_skeleton.md. Read it before searching raw Python files.\\n\"; // Append the compiled context to Pi's system prompt if (context.systemPrompt) { context.systemPrompt += injectedContext; } else { context.systemPrompt = injectedContext; } } };'}]

content.thinking:
Need to export factory function: should export function that returns extension object. Typically default export function(context){...}. So modify to export default function(): any { return {name,..., before_agent_start...}}. Let's edit file replacing export default { ... } with export default function () { return { ... }; }.

We'll read file to confirm formatting.
